final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce promotional campaign.

Style/medium: complex editorial poster layout with artistic lettering and typographic stacking
Composition: layered composition where product(s) or hero subject physically overlap and occlude portions of the stacked typography; visually complex but organized, not chaotic
Subject: cross-border e-commerce promotional products as hero subject(s)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: artistic lettering required; stacked font layers required; product or main subject must cover/block parts of the text; layout must be visually rich and layered but not cluttered
Avoid: plain flat layout, empty minimalism, text fully unobstructed by any subject
